info:
  title: AHV HRM API
  description: Comprehensive API documentation for AHV HRM System
  version: 1.0.0

servers:
  - url: http://103.253.21.98:5857/api/v1
    description: Development server (Default)
  - url: http://localhost:3000/api/v1
    description: Local server

tags:
  - name: Auth
    description: Authentication APIs
  - name: Accounts
    description: Account management APIs
  - name: Employees
    description: Employee management APIs
  - name: Departments
    description: Department management APIs
  - name: Positions
    description: Position management APIs
  - name: Roles
    description: Role management APIs
  - name: ShiftTypes
    description: Shift type definitions
  - name: Shifts
    description: Working shift configurations
  - name: Schedules
    description: Employee work schedules
  - name: Attendances
    description: Attendance records
  - name: AttendanceStatuses
    description: Attendance status definitions
  - name: LeaveTypes
    description: Leave type definitions
  - name: LeaveRequests
    description: Employee leave requests
  - name: LeaveBalances
    description: Employee leave balance management
  - name: OKRs
    description: Objectives and Key Results
  - name: Contracts
    description: Employee contracts
  - name: Payroll
    description: Payroll management
  - name: PayrollDetails
    description: Detailed payroll items
  - name: IncomeTypes
    description: Income type definitions
  - name: DeductionTypes
    description: Deduction type definitions
  - name: Deductions
    description: Specific employee deductions
  - name: SalaryDecisions
    description: Salary change decisions
  - name: GlobalSettings
    description: System-wide settings
  - name: SystemLogs
    description: Audit logs

paths:
  # --- Auth ---
  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Login to system
      requestBody:
        required: true

components:
  schemas:
    # --- Auth schemas ---
    LoginDto:
      type: object
      required: [username, password]
      properties:
        username: { type: string }
        password: { type: string }
    
    # --- Role schemas ---
    CreateRoleDto:
      type: object
      required: [code, name]
      properties:
        code: { type: string }
        name: { type: string }
        description: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    
    UpdateRoleDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        code: { type: string }
        name: { type: string }
        description: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }

    # --- Account schemas ---
    CreateAccountDto:
      type: object
      required: [email, username, password]
      properties:
        email: { type: string, format: email }
        username: { type: string }
        password: { type: string, minLength: 6 }
        employeeId: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    
    UpdateAccountDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        email: { type: string, format: email }
        username: { type: string }
        employeeId: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }

    # --- Employee schemas ---
    CreateEmployeeDto:
      type: object
      required: [email, fullName, code]
      properties:
        email: { type: string, format: email }
        fullName: { type: string }
        code: { type: string }
        phone: { type: string }
        address: { type: string }
        avatar: { type: string }
        departmentId: { type: string }
        positionId: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    
    UpdateEmployeeDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        email: { type: string, format: email }
        fullName: { type: string }
        code: { type: string }
        phone: { type: string }
        address: { type: string }
        avatar: { type: string }
        departmentId: { type: string }
        positionId: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }

    # --- ShiftType schemas ---
    CreateShiftTypeDto:
      type: object
      required: [code, name]
      properties:
        code: { type: string }
        name: { type: string }
        salaryMultiplier: { type: number }
        allowanceAmount: { type: number }
        isOT: { type: boolean }
        description: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    
    UpdateShiftTypeDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        code: { type: string }
        name: { type: string }
        salaryMultiplier: { type: number }
        allowanceAmount: { type: number }
        isOT: { type: boolean }
        description: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    # --- Attendance schemas ---
    CreateAttendanceDto:
      type: object
      required: [employeeId, shiftId, statusId]
      properties:
        employeeId: { type: string }
        shiftId: { type: string }
        statusId: { type: string }
        date: { type: string, format: date }
        checkin: { type: string, format: date-time }
        checkout: { type: string, format: date-time }
        deviceInfo: { type: string }
        totalWorkingHours: { type: number }
        note: { type: string }
    
    UpdateAttendanceDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        checkin: { type: string, format: date-time }
        checkout: { type: string, format: date-time }
        note: { type: string }

    # --- SystemLog schemas ---
    CreateSystemLogDto:
      type: object
      required: [accountId, action, effectTable, recordId]
      properties:
        accountId: { type: string }
        action: { type: string, enum: [C, R, U, D, A, L] }
        effectTable: { type: string }
        recordId: { type: string }
        oldValue: { type: object }
        newValue: { type: object }
        ipAddress: { type: string }
        userAgent: { type: string }
        location: { type: string }
    
    UpdateSystemLogDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        action: { type: string, enum: [C, R, U, D, A, L] }
    # --- SalaryDecision schemas ---
    CreateSalaryDecisionDto:
      type: object
      required: [employeeId, contractId, code]
      properties:
        employeeId: { type: string }
        contractId: { type: string }
        code: { type: string }
        baseSalary: { type: number }
        allowance: { type: number }
        effectiveDate: { type: string, format: date }
        status: { type: string, enum: [pending, approved, cancelled] }
        reason: { type: string }
        signedBy: { type: string }
        isSigned: { type: boolean }
    
    UpdateSalaryDecisionDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        status: { type: string, enum: [pending, approved, cancelled] }
        isSigned: { type: boolean }

    # --- GlobalSetting schemas ---
    CreateGlobalSettingDto:
      type: object
      required: [key, value]
      properties:
        key: { type: string }
        value: { type: string }
        effectiveDate: { type: string, format: date }
        description: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
        valueType: { type: string, enum: [string, number, boolean, array, Object] }
        group: { type: string, enum: [tax, insurance, system] }

    UpdateGlobalSettingDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        value: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }

    # --- Schedule schemas ---
    CreateScheduleDto:
      type: object
      required: [employeeId, shiftId, isOT]
      properties:
        employeeId: { type: string }
        shiftId: { type: string }
        date: { type: string, format: date }
        isOT: { type: boolean }
        note: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    
    UpdateScheduleDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        shiftId: { type: string }
        date: { type: string, format: date }
        isOT: { type: boolean }

    # --- Shift schemas ---
    CreateShiftDto:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        shiftTypeId: { type: string }
        startTime: { type: string, format: date-time }
        endTime: { type: string, format: date-time }
        breakStart: { type: string, format: date-time }
        breakEnd: { type: string, format: date-time }
        totalWorkTime: { type: number }
        gracePeriod: { type: number }
        isOvernight: { type: boolean }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    
    UpdateShiftDto:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    # --- DeductionType schemas ---
    CreateDeductionTypeDto:
      type: object
      required: [code, name, isStatutory]
      properties:
        code: { type: string }
        name: { type: string }
        percentage: { type: number }
        isStatutory: { type: boolean }
        description: { type: string }
        status: { type: string, enum: [active, inactive] }
    
    UpdateDeductionTypeDto:
      type: object
